# PH Weeknotes

> Weeknotes and rambling from Pete Hallett, a grey haired technologist — updates on strategy, architecture, delivery, design and development.

This site contains weekly notes (weeknotes) written by Pete Hallett covering technology strategy, software architecture, delivery, design, and development.

## Author

Pete Hallett is a technologist who writes about strategy, architecture, delivery, design and development.

## Content

- [About](https://weeknote.hallett.life/about): About Pete Hallett
- [Weeknotes](https://weeknote.hallett.life/weeknotes): All weeknotes listed chronologically
- [RSS Feed](https://weeknote.hallett.life/feed.xml): Subscribe to updates

## Topics

- Technology strategy
- Software architecture
- Delivery and project management
- Design
- Software development
